title: Savory Fluffy Chinese Pork Dumplings
description: A traditional Zhejiang dish featuring savory pork dumplings with a hint of pomegranate, perfect for a brunch mood. This paleo-friendly recipe uses wholesome ingredients for a delicious and healthy meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine ground pork, pomegranate seeds, green onions, and ginger.
In a separate bowl, whisk together coconut flour, eggs, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the dry ingredients to the pork mixture and mix until just combined.
Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
When ready to cook, bring a large pot of water to a boil and reduce the heat to a simmer.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the pork mixture into the simmering water.
Cook the dumplings for 10-12 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings with a slotted spoon and serve hot.
Garnish with additional green onions and pomegranate seeds, if desired.
